summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AUTO SOCORRO GOIANÁPOLIS landing page. All major features working correctly including responsive design, navigation, CTAs, and phone/WhatsApp integrations.
passed_tests: Hero section with title and CTAs (Ligar Agora and WhatsApp)
Fixed header with navigation and logo
Phone links using correct tel:+62984043652 format
WhatsApp links using correct wa.me/62984043652 format
All 8 main sections (About, Services, Differentials, Gallery, Coverage, Emergency, Reviews, Footer)
6 service cards with proper icons and descriptions
4 gallery images loading correctly
7 differential items displaying properly
7 coverage area badges
4 customer review cards with 5-star ratings
Emergency section with both phone numbers
Footer with complete contact information
Desktop floating WhatsApp button (bottom right)
Mobile fixed bottom bar with Call and WhatsApp buttons
Animated marquee banner in hero section
Mobile centered logo functionality
Responsive layout working on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844)
All navigation links working correctly
All CTA buttons clickable and properly linked
Header scroll effect working
Color scheme using correct yellow (#f4eb24) and black (#211d1b)
Mobile menu opening and closing correctly
Desktop WhatsApp button hidden on mobile as expected
